filters.notes: ~1% of rows have NULL stmt; zone map skips leading null-stmt blocks entirely (stmt_max == -1)

index_pruning.notes: Skip all leading blocks where every row has NULL stmt. Once stmt_min > -1, all remaining blocks pass. Blocks with stmt_min == -1 but stmt_max > -1 require row-level filtering.

accumulators_per_group.name: adsh_set
accumulators_per_group.notes: small per-group set; merge by union across threads

aggregation.merge_strategy: reduce thread-local direct_arrays; union adsh_sets per group; trivial with ~50 groups

data_structures.group_aggregation: direct_array[65536] (256×256 int8 keys); only ~50 slots active; fits in L1 cache
data_structures.distinct_adsh: hash_set<int32_t> per group (thread-local); merge by union

parallelism.notes: Each thread processes assigned blocks; maintains thread-local direct_array aggregation. Final merge is O(50 groups × nthreads) — negligible.

indexes.notes: Skip blocks with stmt_max == -1 before any I/O on data columns
